title: AgentRunResponse
description:
Final response to `agent/run` or `agent/resume`.

Streaming notifications are sent during the run; this is the aggregated
terminal payload. Hosts may persist it as the canonical run record.

decision_verdict.description:
Optional verdict for review/QA agents that produce pass/fail
decisions. Free-form so review providers can shape their own
envelopes.

duration_ms.description: Total wall-clock duration of the run.

errors.description: Errors emitted during the run (recoverable or terminal).

exit_code.description: Process exit code from the wrapped CLI, if any.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata entries the provider chose to surface.

session_id.description:
Provider-issued session id. Stable for the life of the session;
usable with `agent/resume` later.

thinking.description: Visible reasoning traces (when the model produced any).

tokens_used.description: Token-accounting summary, if the provider tracks it.

tool_calls.description: All tool invocations the agent made during the run.

tool_results.description: All tool results returned to the agent.

TokenUsage.description: Token-accounting summary for an agent run.

cache_writes.description: Tokens written to a prompt cache, if applicable.

cached.description: Tokens served from a prompt cache, if applicable.
